description: Cranking and warmup enrichment curves for B-series engines

cranking_enrichment.description: Fuel multiplier applied during cranking (starter engaged) based on coolant temperature

prime_pulse_ms.description: Initial injector prime pulse before cranking begins

cranking_enrichment.notes: Large injectors (1000cc+) need shorter prime pulses. Scale by (stock_cc / actual_cc) ratio.

afterstart_enrichment.description: Post-start fuel decay enrichment. Tapers down after engine catches.

warmup_enrichment.description: Continuous enrichment based on coolant temp until engine reaches operating temperature
warmup_enrichment.notes: Applied on top of base VE table. Allows richer mixture during warmup for stable idle and catalyst heating.

idle_speed_targets.description: Target idle RPM by coolant temperature for idle air control
idle_speed_targets.notes: Higher idle when cold to prevent stalling and speed catalyst lightoff
